sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88803" key="prosboh/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσβοήθ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">support, aid</tr_>, prob. in Dosith.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0016.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.397" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.397</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
